## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (metric / task / loader)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `mypy` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes and new code is covered
- [ ] Updated docs / CHANGELOG where relevant

## Notes for reviewers

Anything that needs special attention (numerical tolerances, edge cases).
